title: Use Swift/SpriteKit for MVP instead of Android Emulator
preview: Decided to build a native iOS clone in Swift instead of emulating Android.
summary: The user wanted to play the old Android game 'Slugterra' on iOS. We evaluated emulating Android via LiveContainer/UTM, but the performance overhead (Linux kernel emulation + OpenGL to Metal translation) makes a fast-paced match-3 game unplayable. Instead, we are building a vertical slice (MVP) natively in Swift/SpriteKit that perfectly mirrors the core mechanics, and we will extract the original assets from the APK.
